businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) operator — Singapore-based global internet company
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Singapore-headquartered global technology company. Q4 2025 revenue $6.85B (+38.4% YoY), net income $397M, EPS $0.63. FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%). Friday close $91.98 (-3.71%). Attempting to stabilize for 7 days after -26% post-earnings plunge on 3/3. RSI 34.5 near oversold territory. Correlated decline with macro selloff. Forward P/E 22.96x, PEG 1.33.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 SEA e-commerce platform. GMV-based commissions and advertising. Q4 revenue +35.8%
Digital Financial Services (Monee/SeaMoney): Digital payments, lending, insurance. Q4 revenue +54.3%, loan balance $9.2B (+80%)
Digital Entertainment (Garena): Free Fire and other game operations. Q4 bookings +23.8% YoY
keyProducts: Shopee: #1 e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Latin America
Free Fire: Globally popular battle royale mobile game
SeaMoney/Monee: Digital payments and financial services, loan balance $9.2B

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for emerging market growth stock. Valuation attractive post-plunge

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS $4.18 estimate. Attractive relative to growth rate

keyMetrics.name: PEG Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable range. Fair relative to growth after oversold conditions

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Profitability improving steadily. E-commerce margins expanding

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Good capital efficiency. Profitability improving rapidly

growthDrivers.title: Post-Earnings Oversold — RSI 34.5, 7th Day of Bottoming
growthDrivers.description: After -26% plunge on 3/3 earnings, stabilizing for 7 trading days. RSI 34.5 near oversold territory. Selling pressure exhaustion + bottoming signal.

growthDrivers.title: Barchart: 'SE Deeply Oversold, Time to Buy the Dip'
growthDrivers.description: RSI dropped to 27 before rebounding. Net cash $10.57B, Forward P/E 23x — valuation attractive after 40% decline.

growthDrivers.title: Monee Digital Finance Accelerating — Loan Balance $9.2B (+80%)
growthDrivers.description: AI-powered underwriting expanding lending targets. 37M active credit users, NPL 1.1% healthy. Fintech growth engine.

growthDrivers.title: Analysts Maintain Strong Buy — Average Target $179.54 (+95%)
growthDrivers.description: 10 of 11 analysts Buy. Average target $179.54 represents 95% upside from current price. Market consensus: the plunge was excessive.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 52% SEA e-commerce market share (Shopee), fintech-ecommerce-gaming ecosystem synergy, and $10.57B net cash form the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee commands 52% market share in Southeast Asia. Logistics (Shopee Express) vertically integrated.
Monee (SeaMoney) provides payment and lending services to Shopee users. Cross-sell maximized.
Globally popular game provides stable cash flow. Funds e-commerce investments.

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: SEA super app. Mobility + fintech competition

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: Alibaba-backed SEA e-commerce. Lagging behind Shopee

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce rapidly growing in SEA. Key threat

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: Latin America e-commerce. Competing with Shopee's LatAm operations

recentNews.headline: SE -3.71% — correlated decline with macro selloff, 7th day of stabilization
recentNews.significance: Jobs shock + oil surge dragging. But post-plunge stabilization continuing

recentNews.headline: Barclays cuts target $226→$120, maintains Buy
recentNews.significance: Target adjusted for plunge but Buy rating maintained. Fundamentals viewed positively

recentNews.headline: Bernstein cuts target $170→$150, maintains Buy
recentNews.significance: Guidance adjustment reflected. Long-term growth view maintained

recentNews.headline: SE -16.4% plunge (intraday -26.8%) — 2026 EBITDA guidance disappoints
recentNews.significance: FY2025 revenue +36% strong results but flat EBITDA guidance triggered selloff

recentNews.headline: Barchart: 'SE deeply oversold, time to buy the dip'
recentNews.significance: RSI 27 oversold. Net cash $10.57B, valuation attractive after 40% decline

analystOpinions.notableComment: 10 of 11 analysts Buy (Strong Buy + Buy). Barclays maintains Buy even at $120 target. Average target $179.54 (+95%). Consensus: the plunge was excessive.

risks.title: E-Commerce Margin Pressure
risks.description: 2026 flat EBITDA guidance. Increased promotional spending to defend Shopee market share.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Threat
risks.description: Social commerce growing rapidly in SEA. Potential Shopee market share erosion.

risks.title: Macro Headwinds
risks.description: Iran war, oil surge, strong dollar. SEA consumer sentiment weakening risk.

risks.title: Fintech Credit Risk
risks.description: Loan balance $9.2B (+80%) surging. NPL 1.1% but economic slowdown could increase defaults.

risks.title: Geopolitical Risk
risks.description: China-Taiwan tensions, South China Sea conflicts. Regional SEA risk.

buyReasons.title: 95% Upside After Oversold Conditions
buyReasons.rationale: 10 of 11 Buy, average target $179.54 (+95%). 40% plunge creating entry opportunity.

buyReasons.title: Fintech Growth Engine
buyReasons.rationale: Monee lending +80% growth, 37M credit users, NPL 1.1%. Emerging market fintech leader.

buyReasons.title: Net Cash $7.24B — Financial Safety Net
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash per share $12.23. 13.3% of $91.98 stock price is cash. Strong downside protection.

buyReasons.title: Structural SEA Digital Economy Growth
buyReasons.rationale: SEA internet economy growing 20%+ annually. Shopee's 52% share directly benefits.

overallOpinion: The -26% post-earnings plunge on 3/3 was an overreaction to flat FY2026 EBITDA guidance. FY2025 revenue +36%, fintech +80% growth, and net cash $10.57B fundamentals remain intact. RSI 34.5 in oversold territory, 7 days of bottoming. 10 of 11 analysts maintain Buy, average target $179.54 (+95% from current) indicates the market views the plunge as excessive. Short-term macro headwinds (oil, employment) weigh, but structural SEA digital economy growth and $7.24B net cash protect the downside. Current levels present a medium-to-long-term entry opportunity.

threads.text:

Now $91.98, down 40% from highs.

Revenue +36%, fintech +80% growth.
Net cash $10.57B, Forward P/E 23x.

10 of 11 Buy, avg target $179 (+95%).
RSI 34 — oversold bottoming for 7 days.

Did the market overreact?

telegram.hook: 💰 SE -40% with +95% Target — Oversold Opportunity in SEA's Largest Company
telegram.text:
Sea Limited plunged -26% post-earnings and has been bottoming for 7 days.
Friday close $91.98 (-3.71%), down 40% from highs.

📊 Current status:
• Market cap $54.45B, Forward P/E 23x, PEG 1.33
• FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%)
• Monee lending $9.2B (+80%), NPL 1.1%
• Net cash $10.57B ($12.23/share)
• RSI 34.5 — oversold territory

🎯 Why the plunge:
• 2026 flat EBITDA guidance → market disappointed
• E-commerce margin investment expansion plans

📈 Why it's an opportunity:
• 10/11 Buy, target $179.54 (+95%)
• Barclays maintains Buy even at $120 target
• Valuation attractive after 40% decline

⚠️ Risks: TikTok Shop threat, macro headwinds, fintech credit risk

SEA digital economy conviction → medium-term entry opportunity.

🔗 https://investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-09
